customers.name: Eleanor Vance
customers.address: 1840 Century Park East, Los Angeles, CA 90067
customers.notes: Eleanor prefers understated, high-quality items. Avoid branded merchandise. Shows strong preference for items from independent European artisans. Highly allergic to nuts.

customers.name: Julian Blackwood
customers.notes: Classic British luxury aesthetic. Appreciates master craftsmanship and single-batch items. Avid watch collector.

customers.name: Sophia Chen
customers.address: 520 Sand Hill Road, Menlo Park, CA 94025
customers.notes: Minimalist designer look. Prefers clean, geometric designs, organic materials, and sustainable products. Huge foodie.

customers.name: Marcus Thorne
customers.notes: Prefers classic luxury: full-grain leather, humidors, vintage desk organizers. Avoid synthetic fabrics.

customers.name: Theodore Roosevelt
customers.address: 26 Sagamore Hill Road, Oyster Bay, NY 11771
customers.notes: Extremely vigorous preferences. Loves wildlife illustrations, rugged adventure gear, and historical books.

customers.name: Margaret White
customers.notes: Prefers red wine over white. Highly allergic to nuts. A connoisseur of classical chamber arrangements.

customers.name: James Bond
customers.notes: Signature preference: Martinis, shaken, not stirred. Highly technical sports gadgets, exquisite tailoring.

customers.name: Eleanor Rothschild
customers.notes: Extremely high net worth estate patron. Demands absolute perfection and vintage heritage curation.

customers.name: Arthur Pendelton
customers.notes: Appreciates limited reserve spirits and vintage collectibles.

customers.name: Margaret Reed
customers.notes: Loves high-end corporate planners and organic coffee roasts.

customers.name: Beatrix Ashby

reminders.message:
Dear Eleanor Vance,

As your upcoming 10th Wedding Anniversary approaches, we wanted to take a moment to curate a selection of elegant options tailored specifically to your tastes.

Our team has finalized suggestions matching your custom flavor profile.

Warm regards,
Alexandria Concierge

Dear Theodore Roosevelt,

As your upcoming Spouse Birthday approaches, we wanted to take a moment to curate a selection of elegant options tailored specifically to your tastes.

Our team has finalized suggestions matching your custom flavor profile.
